flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Denison University rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($57.5k → $67.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Denison University rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($57.5k → $67.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Denison University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Denison University are 27% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($67.8k vs $53.2k).
